name: AutoReplyAI
tagline: AI customer support SaaS — embeddable chat widget, Gemini AI with knowledge base context, Stripe billing, Next.js dashboard
description: Complete customer support widget that website owners embed with one script tag. Gemini AI generates responses using the site's knowledge base for context. Express backend with Prisma + SQLite. Next.js dashboard: knowledge base CRUD, conversation viewer, analytics, widget customization, Stripe billing (Free/Pro $29/Business $99). Zero-dependency embeddable widget with typing indicators and mobile fullscreen.
